holdings.n: Fidelity Securities Lending Cash Central Fund

holdings.infoBox: FLRG is an equity ETF with a total of 106 individual holdings. The top holdings are NVIDIA stock at 7.45%, Apple at 6.43%, Alphabet at 5.61%, Microsoft at 4.39%, and Broadcom at 2.87%.

overview.description: The Fidelity U.S. Multifactor ETF (FLRG) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the Fidelity U.S. Multifactor index. The fund tracks an index large-cap US stocks selected by four factors - value, quality, low volatility, and momentum. FLRG was launched on Sep 15, 2020 and is issued by Fidelity.
